title: Grammys 2026: Kendrick Lamar Makes History With Best Rap Album Win, Breaks Jay-Z Record
text: At the February 1, 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony, Kendrick Lamar achieved a historic milestone by breaking Jay-Z's record as the most-awarded rapper in Grammy history. The achievement came when Lamar won Best Rap Album for his album GNX. Lamar surpassed Jay-Z's previous record after accumulating 23 total Grammy wins. Leading into the 2026 ceremony with nine nominations, the 38-year-old Compton native added to his already impressive trophy collection. During his acceptance speech at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles, Lamar remained characteristically humble about his accomplishment. He stated: I'm not good at talking about myself, but I express it through the music, while emphasizing that hip hop is gonna always be right here. Beyond the Best Rap Album victory, Lamar secured three additional Grammy wins during the 2026 ceremony, including Record of the Year for his collaboration with SZA on Luther.
